narrative: Tehran re-assesses US talks following overnight clashes as gold retreats -2.31% below $4,200; equities -0.26%; DXY -0.03%; VIX 21.3. USD/JPY holds at 160.47 near intervention levels, supported by 300bp Fed-BoJ carry despite moderate put skew in 25d RR (Saxo, 1M). AUD/USD tests 0.7011 as negative CESI (-8) and 1.919% G10 spread vs USD signal sustained weakness. Watch US CPI at 12:30 UTC and BoC Rate Decision at 13:45 UTC.
